execution_model.dynamic_spawn: When roadmap_next() reveals newly unblocked items, spawn a new lane-owner for each immediately — do NOT wait for a wave boundary. Each lane runs its own lifecycle (cartography → plan → execution → validation) independently.
execution_model.trigger: After any lane completes, call roadmap_next() to check if its completion unblocked dependents. If yes, spawn lanes for newly unblocked items in the same turn as background tasks.
execution_model.concurrency: Each roadmap item is one lane. All non-blocked lanes run simultaneously. Contention on shared files uses produce_fragment with a consolidator pass before session end.

blocking_dependency_chains.note: PG-001 at 45% (4 sessions). Once it completes, PG-002 unblocks. Each completion cascades down the chain. Spawn a new lane for each as soon as it unblocks.
PG-001 is the single biggest unlocker — completing it unblocks 7 items across phases 3-2 and 3-3. When PG-001 completes, spawn 7 lanes simultaneously (one per unblocked item).
Straight chain. Spawn DC-002 lane when DC-001 completes, DC-003 when DC-002 completes.
HC-001 depends on DC-001 (not PG-001 directly). HC-003 depends on HC-001 but not HC-002.
DT-001 is already actionable (no deps). DT-002 unblocks when DT-001 completes.
L10N-001 already actionable. Spawn L10N-002 when L10N-001 completes, L10N-003 when L10N-002 completes.

immediate_next_lanes.title: Complete Drizzle schema definitions for all tables on Postgres
immediate_next_lanes.context_summary: account.pg.sql.ts exists untracked, account.sql.ts has staged TimestampsPg changes. ~6 tables need Pg schema definitions. Must be dual-write compatible with SQLite during migration.
immediate_next_lanes.next_step: Inventory remaining tables, finish Pg schema for each, add dual-write validation.

immediate_next_lanes.title: Dialog component test harness
immediate_next_lanes.context_summary: Phase 2 added 54 IPC tests but zero dialog component tests. Need a SolidJS dialog test harness: mount, interact, assert visible/hidden, assert callbacks fired.
immediate_next_lanes.next_step: Build test harness: mountDialog(), clickButton(), assertDialogVisible().

immediate_next_lanes.title: Locale fallback chain
immediate_next_lanes.context_summary: github.* keys exist in only 1 of 17 locales. Need a fallback chain: requested locale → parent locale (zh-CN → zh) → base (en). Missing keys silently fall through instead of showing key names.
immediate_next_lanes.next_step: Implement fallback chain in the i18n provider.

context_from_this_session.subagent_type_restriction: lane-owner subagent type is NOT in the task() allowlist. Use execution for code work, plan for planning, explore for discovery, test-engineer for tests, cleaner for cleanup tasks.
context_from_this_session.typecheck_status: 115 pre-existing type errors remain across 10 files (src/agent/, src/lifecycle/, src/event/, src/server/routes/, src/plugin/, scripts/). Not from this session's changes.

risk_notes: PG-001 is the critical path — 7 items unblock when it lands. Prioritize it above all else.
PG-001 has had 4 prior sessions at 45% — consider a scout/discovery lane to understand what's blocking before sending an execution lane.

Pre-existing type errors in src/agent/operating-picture.ts (12 errors) and src/lifecycle/ (48 errors across builtins.ts, loop.ts, definition.ts, engine.ts) may cause false typecheck failures in new lanes.
The dynamic spawn pattern means a single PG-001 completion could trigger 5 simultaneous lanes — prepare the consolidation plan in advance.
